channel.title: mrs.space.cadet TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from mrs.space.cadet

item.title: Don’t say I didn’t warn you. I’m going to be someone who can do a pull-up by the end of this year 😤
item.description: Don’t say I didn’t warn you. I’m going to be someone who can do a pull-up by the end of this year 😤

item.title: Nothing to worry about here except me being startled by my own child 😑 I’m planning to film the whole trip so you can see what it’s like to be someone like me on a brand trip centered around running aka fast boiis and gorls and theys 🏃‍♀️💨 at this point I
item.description: Nothing to worry about here except me being startled by my own child 😑 I’m planning to film the whole trip so you can see what it’s like to be someone like me on a brand trip centered around running aka fast boiis and gorls and theys 🏃‍♀️💨 at this point I

item.title: Trying boxing with Million Dollar Mo hurt mentally and physically but I loved learning the sport from an Olympic gold medalist 😌🥇 Should my next stop be WWE?
item.description: Trying boxing with Million Dollar Mo hurt mentally and physically but I loved learning the sport from an Olympic gold medalist 😌🥇 Should my next stop be WWE?

item.title: Will one set of hill repeats realistically make me fast enough to keep up with zoomy running influencers on a brand trip? No. Can I trick myself into thinking it did? Yes.
item.description: Will one set of hill repeats realistically make me fast enough to keep up with zoomy running influencers on a brand trip? No. Can I trick myself into thinking it did? Yes.

item.title: I put together a presentation on @Craig Conover and Southern Charm to explain to my friends and sister who I’ll be racing against in the 10k. I didn’t even make it past side 2 before “losing my phone” 😑
item.description: I put together a presentation on @Craig Conover and Southern Charm to explain to my friends and sister who I’ll be racing against in the 10k. I didn’t even make it past side 2 before “losing my phone” 😑

item.title: I don’t even know anymore but I know I don’t like it 😑
item.description: I don’t even know anymore but I know I don’t like it 😑

item.title: I had one of my kids get this video of me running because I was like omg I got it and need proof that my form is on point 😩 I now have proof of something and it’s that my form is in fact NOT on point
item.description: I had one of my kids get this video of me running because I was like omg I got it and need proof that my form is on point 😩 I now have proof of something and it’s that my form is in fact NOT on point

item.title: Caught some of China vs Germany sled hockey while packing but I’ll have a lot to catch up on once I get home. Can’t wait to watch my fave @Team USA athletes compete 🥰
item.description: Caught some of China vs Germany sled hockey while packing but I’ll have a lot to catch up on once I get home. Can’t wait to watch my fave @Team USA athletes compete 🥰

item.title: Record numbers of new fans are tuning in to the Paralympics, yet some events have no commentary, so essentially just ski noise and crowds cheering. From what I understand, some events weren’t even filmed?? Drop your Paralympic broadcast complaints here be
item.description: Record numbers of new fans are tuning in to the Paralympics, yet some events have no commentary, so essentially just ski noise and crowds cheering. From what I understand, some events weren’t even filmed?? Drop your Paralympic broadcast complaints here be

item.title: It doesn’t show up as well on video but it was about 30ft out and stayed in the same spot for at least the hour we were there.
item.description: It doesn’t show up as well on video but it was about 30ft out and stayed in the same spot for at least the hour we were there.

item.title: #sponsored As a mom of three with a chaotic schedule, it’s easy to forget to start hydrating the day before a long run. One of my favorite life hacks is stashing #Pedialyte Sport packets everywhere I spend time — in my bag, in my car and at my desk. That
item.description: #sponsored As a mom of three with a chaotic schedule, it’s easy to forget to start hydrating the day before a long run. One of my favorite life hacks is stashing #Pedialyte Sport packets everywhere I spend time — in my bag, in my car and at my desk. That

item.title: Should I take this blind confidence to an indoor gym? I’ll be careful not to intimidate everyone.
item.description: Should I take this blind confidence to an indoor gym? I’ll be careful not to intimidate everyone.

item.title: I started making this video about my language barrier being the reason I didn’t tell the runners about a new shoe and realized it wasn’t that 😬
item.description: I started making this video about my language barrier being the reason I didn’t tell the runners about a new shoe and realized it wasn’t that 😬

item.title: Running out here gets spooky sometimes all the time
item.description: Running out here gets spooky sometimes all the time

item.title: #stitch with @Nicole Gomez 🏔️ and may I go a step further and recommend black if you sweat a lot and care about how that looks 😑 I have yet to find flowy shorts that do not ride up but another season of shorts gobbling videos will be here soon because I’m
item.description: #stitch with @Nicole Gomez 🏔️ and may I go a step further and recommend black if you sweat a lot and care about how that looks 😑 I have yet to find flowy shorts that do not ride up but another season of shorts gobbling videos will be here soon because I’m

item.title: This is what it feels like when I film myself running to check my form
item.description: This is what it feels like when I film myself running to check my form

item.title: It’s just me vs. @Craig Conover on the back roads of rural PA on April 7th and I really want to crush him!! Please consider donating if you can because even if I lose I can be happy that we raised $20k for charity 🥹🙏 Also help us figure out what the loser
item.description: It’s just me vs. @Craig Conover on the back roads of rural PA on April 7th and I really want to crush him!! Please consider donating if you can because even if I lose I can be happy that we raised $20k for charity 🥹🙏 Also help us figure out what the loser

item.title: And it’s of course my unmotivated current self who received the pull-up bar delivery over the weekend. Time for day 1 of a 12 week pull-up program 😑
item.description: And it’s of course my unmotivated current self who received the pull-up bar delivery over the weekend. Time for day 1 of a 12 week pull-up program 😑

item.title: This was an absolute disaster but I did it. It can only get better from here, right? RIGHT?! I’ve never wanted to quit something so fast but I’m taking that as a sign I need to stick with it. Follow along to watch me become insufferable as soon as I can d
item.description: This was an absolute disaster but I did it. It can only get better from here, right? RIGHT?! I’ve never wanted to quit something so fast but I’m taking that as a sign I need to stick with it. Follow along to watch me become insufferable as soon as I can d

item.title: Watch your pace with these shoes I think they put mini rockets in them or something
item.description: Watch your pace with these shoes I think they put mini rockets in them or something

item.title: @Craig Conover thinks I hustled him. I guess we’ll never know 🙂‍↔️
item.description: @Craig Conover thinks I hustled him. I guess we’ll never know 🙂‍↔️

item.title: I forgot to show my palms but add arrows for those as well 😩 the program I’m following is called Pull-up Revolution
item.description: I forgot to show my palms but add arrows for those as well 😩 the program I’m following is called Pull-up Revolution

item.title: What else should I add to the list?
item.description: What else should I add to the list?

item.title: Runners of all abilities put so much work into making it to the start line of a marathon, so I totally get why they want to grab all of the marathon-specific gear! I hope anyone with a connection to Boston Marathon can get a pair of these @Shokz Sports li
item.description: Runners of all abilities put so much work into making it to the start line of a marathon, so I totally get why they want to grab all of the marathon-specific gear! I hope anyone with a connection to Boston Marathon can get a pair of these @Shokz Sports li

item.title: The perils of having a body that jiggles 🙃
item.description: The perils of having a body that jiggles 🙃

item.title: Boston Marathon weekend = me running around Boston with a microphone 🎤 I’ll be recording my podcast * @Nonmembers Only * all weekend—and we’re doing a LIVE episode Sunday at Fan Fest 👀 If you listen, come say hi. If you don’t… this is your sign that you
item.description: Boston Marathon weekend = me running around Boston with a microphone 🎤 I’ll be recording my podcast * @Nonmembers Only * all weekend—and we’re doing a LIVE episode Sunday at Fan Fest 👀 If you listen, come say hi. If you don’t… this is your sign that you

item.title: Dress for the job you want, not the job you have 😌
item.description: Dress for the job you want, not the job you have 😌

item.title: This was the biggest @adidas shakeout run I’ve ever been to and somehow they didn’t lose anyone including me 😅 Also, I wanted someone to make decisions for me in the styling suite and they did because apparently a styling suite has stylists 🤭 #createdwith
item.description: This was the biggest @adidas shakeout run I’ve ever been to and somehow they didn’t lose anyone including me 😅 Also, I wanted someone to make decisions for me in the styling suite and they did because apparently a styling suite has stylists 🤭 #createdwith

item.title: I thought I was losing by a lot based on my miscalculations during mile 5 so I ran my fastest to the point of feeling sick and ended up beating Craig instead 🤭 @Craig Conover
item.description: I thought I was losing by a lot based on my miscalculations during mile 5 so I ran my fastest to the point of feeling sick and ended up beating Craig instead 🤭 @Craig Conover
